four digits indicate the ingredient, strength, dosage form and route of administration; and the last two 
digits indicate the packaging. 

NDC code in the following format: MMMMMDDDDPP followed by 29 spaces. 

CMS rejects the following codes: 99999999999, 99999999992, 99999999993, 99999999994, 
99999999995 and 99999999996.
